column1: Corrected benchmark: Alexandra replaces Barcelona as the performance reference

column5: Alexandra has generated more than all other sites combined
Alexandra's peak EXCEEDED the R2,964 historical benchmark
Alexandra achieved this WITHOUT outdoor AP advantage
When properly monetised, rates are comparable
April monetisation collapse — not a traffic issue
Alexandra still has the audience; revenue isn't converting
BUT this is the anomaly, not the norm
Alexandra is the actual top performer over the pilot period
At Barcelona's rev/impression rate × Alexandra's traffic

column2: Work with Think Digital X to diagnose why 53k impressions converted at R0.007 vs Feb's R0.085. Likely: premium ad campaign ended, programmatic fill rate dropped, or portal config changed.
If indoor-only generates R2,387/mo, outdoor AP could reach R5,300/mo — the single highest-value intervention in the entire network.
The business case should use Alexandra's demonstrated R2,387/mo (indoor) as the base, not Barcelona's R770/mo. With outdoor AP, R5,300/mo is the realistic ceiling.

Identify what makes Alexandra different: high-density township, major shopping complex location (Alexandra Plaza), community foot traffic spilling into indoor range. Prioritise Phase 2 sites with similar characteristics.
